visualGoal: Make a FlightSimExpo-season buyer confident about which ONE reveal to buy for their airplane before they read the wait/skip caveats. Real product proof anchors the buyable picks (TCA Sky Yoke, Honeycomb deck, TCA Airbus, MOZA MTQ, VelocityOne, Boeing yoke, pedals, head tracking); the headline new-hardware reveals (Warthog MKII, OMNI, MOZA flight FFB, WinWing panels) stay text-and-link until real photos exist. No procedural art.

realProductPhotosNeeded.product: MOZA AB9 Flight Force Feedback Base
realProductPhotosNeeded.notes: Flagship enthusiast reveal, ~$499 base / 12Nm peak. Currently text-only in body — no verified image. Needs a real base photo before it can appear as a gearpick/shotgrid or be certified. NOTE: moza-ay210-ffb-yoke.jpg exists on disk but is NOT in verified-product-images.json and is a different product (yoke), so it cannot stand in for the AB9.

realProductPhotosNeeded.product: MOZA AB6 Flight Force Feedback Bundle
realProductPhotosNeeded.notes: Budget/combat FFB reveal, ~$399 bundle (base + MHG grip + clamp) / 6Nm peak. Text-only until real photo sourced and vision-verified.

realProductPhotosNeeded.product: MOZA MFY Yoke on AY210 base
realProductPhotosNeeded.notes: Airliner-focused FFB yoke, ~$149 handle + ~$699 AY210 base. moza-ay210-ffb-yoke.jpg exists on disk but is unverified; add to verified set only after vision-check confirms exact product.

Combat HOTAS refresh, $599.99, Sept 2026. thrustmaster-hotas-warthog.jpg (OLD Warthog) exists in the space/ folder but is NOT verified for flight and is the previous generation — do not use it for the MKII. Needs a real MKII photo.
$44.99 sidestick reposition arm, space-sim accessory. Low priority; text-only. Source a real photo only if it earns a body visual.
Airbus glareshield panel. winwing-fcu-efis-combo-a320.jpg exists on disk but is NOT in verified-product-images.json. Verify before body use or certification.
winwing-mcdu-a320.jpg and winwing-pap-3-mcp.jpg exist on disk but are unverified. Add to verified set after vision-check to enable body visuals.

editorialCompositePrompts.prompt: Realistic FlightSimExpo-style hardware bench under clean expo lighting, a home flight-sim desk with an empty mounting zone left open for a real yoke product overlay, cable tray and monitor with a generic non-branded MSFS-style cockpit view, curator Mac Donovan gesturing at the open mount, no fake branded hardware, no fake UI text, 16:9 editorial cover.
editorialCompositePrompts.negativePrompt: fake logos, fake yoke, warped controls, impossible ergonomics, tiny unreadable text, procedural gradient art

infographicPrompts.title: Match the FlightSimExpo 2026 reveal to your airplane
content: GA -> Honeycomb deck now, watch Sky Yoke
Airbus -> TCA Sidestick + Quadrant, WinWing panels later
Combat -> Warthog MKII or MOZA AB6
infographicPrompts.style: IgnitionSim command-center chart, large readable text, flight blues, real product photos as row markers for Codex overlay

infographicPrompts.title: MOZA flight FFB: AB6 or AB9?
content: Fly fighters / new to FFB / tight budget -> AB6 (~$399, 6Nm)
Fly airliners or heavy warbirds -> AB9 (~$499, 12Nm)
MFY yoke = separate AY210 base path
infographicPrompts.style: Two-branch decision tree, product-photo placeholders for Codex overlays

curatorScenePrompts.prompt: Realistic adult flight-sim curator Mac Donovan at a clean home cockpit desk during FlightSimExpo season, one hand resting on a yoke mount, thoughtful advisor energy, product overlay space beside him, practical not fantasy, 4:5 portrait.
